calendar.description: House Business, Labor, and Commerce Hearing
House Business, Labor, and Commerce Hearing
Senate Health and Human Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill amends provisions regarding ambulance provider payments.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>adjusts ambulance rates related to Medicaid;<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>amends provisions related to the base rate;<hr><ltbullet>authorizes the Bureau of Emergency Medical Services to adjust the base rate each year;<hr><ltbullet>amends the base rate to include the cost of medicine;<hr><ltbullet>allows an ambulance provider to collect up to the base rate and mileage rate;<hr><ltbullet>repeals sunset dates; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical changes.
